This is a [Next.js](https://nextjs.org) project

Live Website: [https://carclaims.freeinsurancedata.com](https://carclaims.freeinsurancedata.com/?token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9..9hNc8zmaowJ3zrX9zECzjC2BMGj7cYw8xtCD2FBZ58o)

## Getting Started

First, run the development server:

```bash
npm run dev
```

Open [http://localhost:3000](http://localhost:3000) with your browser to see the result.
